baseline_test_note: Baseline not run in planning phase. Executor should run the full vitest suite for reigh-app before Phase 1 starts to record pre-existing failures, then ensure no new failures are introduced by each phase.
meta_commentary: Ship as FOUR separate PRs in strict order. Phase 1 is the bug fix and must land and be user-confirmed BEFORE Phase 2 begins — do not batch. Phase 3 has two flagged gotchas: (a) the `editVersionRef`/per-save comparator at useDebouncedSettingsSave.ts:166-171 is the ONLY thing safe to delete; `pendingSettingsRef`, `pendingEntityIdRef`, `hasPendingFor`, and loader-side callsites at autoSaveSettingsLoaders.ts:61,132 MUST be preserved (FLAG-001). (b) Before removing the comparator, confirm via grep that NO free-text field still routes through per-keystroke debounced autosave — main prompt, Img2Img prompt (Img2ImgControls.tsx:69), custom LoRA URL (EditModePanel.tsx:357) are the known ones; grep `setSettings({` for other text callers. Phase 2 step 7 (T8) is a decision point: do NOT pre-commit to Path A (wrap-in-providers) vs Path B (pure-props). Read LightboxStateContext, ImageEditFormContext, and variants provider surfaces first, compare diff size, and pick the smaller one. Critical regression risk: InlineEditView currently depends on `stateOverrides.coreState.onClose` — deleting stateOverrides without supplying a real onClose via provider will break the inline-edit close button. For Phase 1 T4, do NOT blindly migrate every `useImageEditFormSafe` callsite — ImageEditContext.test.tsx may legitimately want the Safe variant; add a justifying comment there. Lightbox close signal for Phase 3: confirm whether the lightbox unmounts on close or just hides — if it only hides, the entity-change cleanup effect in useDebouncedSettingsSave won't fire, and you'll need an explicit onClose→flush hook. Phase 4 T14 should prefer adding to existing eslint-rules/ infra if present; otherwise a grep-based lint-step check is acceptable. No new .md files (CLAUDE.md edit only). Errors-only toasts, no hardcoded colors, never `npx supabase db reset --linked`.
watch_items: Phase 1 must ship alone and get user confirmation before Phase 2 begins — do not batch phases

Base UI Dialog cleanup only runs on open=false, NOT on unmount-while-open; early-returning null above an open Dialog strands body pointer-events:none and focus scope — this is the root cause of the typing bug
If DialogContent is expensive when closed, gate `{isOpen && <DialogContent/>}` — but keep the `<Dialog>` root mounted
EMPTY_FORM no-op setters silently drop typing — any new required-context hook must throw, never return a default

Phase 2 T8 path choice (wrap-in-providers vs pure-props) is an implementation-time decision; Path A requires wrapping InlineEditView in LightboxStateProvider + LightboxVariantsProvider + existing ImageEditProvider and supplying a real onClose — do not delete stateOverrides until the provider chain is live or InlineEditView close button will regress
EditModePanel consumes THREE contexts: useImageEditFormSafe, useLightboxCoreSafe, useLightboxVariantsSafe — enumerate the full stateOverrides surface (types.ts:33) before collapsing

Phase 3: only `editVersionRef` + `incrementEditVersion` + the per-save comparator at useDebouncedSettingsSave.ts:166-171 are safe to delete. PRESERVE `pendingSettingsRef`, `pendingEntityIdRef`, `hasPendingFor`, `trackPendingUpdate`, and loader-side callsites at autoSaveSettingsLoaders.ts:61,132 (load-race protection)

Phase 3 must move ALL free-text inputs off per-keystroke autosave: main prompt, Img2Img prompt (Img2ImgControls.tsx:69), custom LoRA URL (EditModePanel.tsx:357) — grep for additional `setSettings({ …text })` callers before removing the edit-version comparator

Lightbox close-flush: confirm whether lightbox unmounts or just hides; entity-change cleanup in useDebouncedSettingsSave.ts:220-249 only fires on unmount — may need explicit onClose hook to flush pending text saves
Free-text keystroke handlers must still call trackPendingUpdate into pendingSettingsRef (no timer) so close/unmount cleanup can flush them
Phase 3 T11 reducer must preserve public API of useAutoSaveSettings and the loader-side hasPendingFor interface
No new .md files; edit reigh-app/CLAUDE.md only (T15)
Repo conventions: errors-only toasts, no hardcoded colors, never `npx supabase db reset --linked`
Tests exist for EditModePanel and useAutoSaveSettings — preserve behavior and update tests as needed; do not create parallel test files
Assumption: Base UI <Dialog open> renders nothing heavy at Portal level when closed; if profiling shows otherwise, gate DialogContent instead

sense_checks.question: Does LoraSelectorModal.tsx no longer contain `if (!isOpen) return null;` above the <Dialog open={isOpen}> return, and does the Dialog still render correctly when closed (no heavy DOM, cleanup runs)?
Does PhaseConfigSelectorModal.tsx no longer early-return null above its <Dialog>, with the same gating strategy as LoraSelectorModal?

Does the top of reigh-app/src/shared/components/ui/dialog.tsx contain a ≤6-line comment stating: never early-return null above <Dialog open> because Base UI cleanup runs on open=false not unmount; gate DialogContent if children are heavy?
Does useImageEditForm (strict) throw when context is missing, does useImageEditFormSafe remain as opt-in fallback only, and are all non-test callsites migrated to the strict variant?

Do vitest suites for media-lightbox, lora, and PhaseConfigSelectorModal pass, and has the user manually confirmed they can type in the edit textarea AND open the model Select after using the LoRA selector?

Is EditModePanel.tsx now under ~150 lines, split into TextEditPanel/InpaintPanel/AnnotatePanel/RepositionPanel/Img2ImgPanel/UpscalePanel siblings under editModes/, with zero IIFE-in-JSX blocks and a thin router at the top?

Was the full stateOverrides surface (coreState incl. onClose, imageEditState, variantsState per types.ts:33) enumerated before step 8, and is the Path A vs Path B decision documented in the commit message with diff-size reasoning?
Is there exactly one source of truth for edit-panel state (props OR context, not both), does InlineEditView's close button still close the inline editor, and do all variants controls still function?
Does useInpainting.ts no longer use `incomingSet ?? fallbackSet` for annotationMode/inpaintPrompt/inpaintNumGenerations, is the reset-on-undefined effect at ~line 133 removed, and are tests updated?
Does Phase 2 type-check cleanly, do media-lightbox and edit-images vitest suites pass, and does manual smoke confirm every mode renders and persists state?

Do ALL free-text fields (main prompt, Img2Img prompt, custom LoRA URL, plus any others found by grep) save on blur/generate/lightbox-close only, while sliders/toggles remain debounced; are editVersionRef/incrementEditVersion/the comparator at useDebouncedSettingsSave.ts:166-171 removed; and are pendingSettingsRef/pendingEntityIdRef/hasPendingFor plus loader-side callsites at autoSaveSettingsLoaders.ts:61,132 preserved with explanatory comments?

Does useAutoSaveSettings route all entity-change transitions through a single useReducer with ENTITY_CHANGED/LOAD_STARTED/LOAD_RESOLVED/SETTINGS_UPDATED actions, with zero render-phase setSettings or ref mutations remaining at the three prior locations, and is the public API + loader interface preserved?
Does a fast-typing stress test across all three free-text fields with an in-flight async entity-settings load drop zero characters, and do useAutoSaveSettings + persistence tests pass?
Does a lint rule or documented check fire on a fixture containing `if (!open) return null;` immediately before a <Dialog> return, and pass on a compliant fixture?
Does reigh-app/CLAUDE.md now document the no-op-default-context antipattern (required-provider hooks must throw; Safe variant only with inline justification), with no new .md files created?

Does the final verification pass include: lint clean, type-check clean, all vitest suites green, and a throwaway repro script that reproduces the original typing bug (and confirms it is fixed) was run and deleted?

plan_steps_covered.plan_step_summary: Phase 1 Step 1: Remove `if (!isOpen) return null` above <Dialog> in LoraSelectorModal.tsx:67-69
Phase 1 Step 2: Same fix in PhaseConfigSelectorModal.tsx:82-84
Phase 1 Step 3: Add guard comment at top of dialog.tsx
Phase 1 Step 4: Make useImageEditForm strict (throw); keep Safe as opt-in
Phase 1 Step 5: Prove Phase 1 via tests + user smoke; ship standalone PR and pause
Phase 2 Step 6: Split EditModePanel.tsx into per-mode siblings; eliminate IIFEs
Phase 2 Step 7: Enumerate stateOverrides surface and compare Path A vs Path B for collapsing props-vs-context hybrid
Phase 2 Step 7 continued: Execute chosen path (wrap-in-providers OR pure-props), update tests, document choice
Phase 2 Step 8: Flatten setter re-wrapping in useInpainting.ts, remove fallbacks and reset effect
Phase 2 Step 9: Prove Phase 2 via type-check + vitest + manual mode smoke
Phase 3 Step 10: Move ALL free-text fields off per-keystroke autosave; remove only the per-save edit-version comparator; preserve load-race guards
Phase 3 Step 11: Consolidate useAutoSaveSettings entity-change coordination into a useReducer
Phase 3 validation: useAutoSaveSettings + persistence tests + fast-typing stress test
Phase 4 Step 12: ESLint rule or grep check for Dialog early-return pattern with fixtures
Phase 4 Step 13: Document no-op-default-context antipattern in reigh-app/CLAUDE.md
Final verification: lint + type-check + full vitest + bug-repro script

validation.completeness_notes: Every plan step maps to at least one finalize task. Phase 2 Step 7 is split across T7 (enumerate + decide) and T8 (execute) because the plan explicitly mandates decision-at-implementation-time rather than pre-commitment. T16 is the mandatory final test/verification task per finalize requirements.

tasks.description: Phase 1 / Step 1: In reigh-app/src/domains/lora/components/LoraSelectorModal/LoraSelectorModal.tsx, delete the `if (!isOpen) return null;` block at lines 67-69. The subsequent `<Dialog open={isOpen}>` already handles closed-state rendering and, critically, runs Base UI's open→closed cleanup (releases body pointer-events:none and focus scope). Verify nothing above the early-return depended on conditional mount. If closed-state render cost is a concern, gate `{isOpen && <DialogContent …/>}` only — keep the `<Dialog>` root mounted.

Phase 1 / Step 2: Apply the same fix in reigh-app/src/shared/components/PhaseConfigSelectorModal/PhaseConfigSelectorModal.tsx — delete `if (!isOpen) return null;` at lines 82-84. Use the same `{isOpen && <DialogContent/>}` fallback if closed-state render cost matters; keep `<Dialog>` mounted.

Phase 1 / Step 3: Prepend a ≤6-line block comment at the top of reigh-app/src/shared/components/ui/dialog.tsx documenting the rule: never early-return null above `<Dialog open>` — Base UI cleanup runs on `open=false`, not on unmount; gate `<DialogContent>` if children are heavy. Keep it terse and focused on the WHY.

Phase 1 / Step 4: In reigh-app/src/domains/media-lightbox/contexts/ImageEditFormContext.tsx, export a new strict `useImageEditForm()` hook that throws when context is null. Keep `useImageEditFormSafe()` returning `context ?? EMPTY_FORM` for explicit opt-in callers (keep EMPTY_FORM file-local). Migrate callsites of `useImageEditFormSafe` to strict `useImageEditForm`: useEditModePanelState.ts and ImageEditContext.tsx become strict. ImageEditContext.test.tsx may remain on Safe if it intentionally omits a provider — add a justifying inline comment, otherwise wrap in a provider and switch to strict.

Phase 1 validation: Run vitest scoped to src/domains/media-lightbox, src/domains/lora, and src/shared/components/PhaseConfigSelectorModal (confirm runner command from reigh-app/package.json). Write a short throwaway script / test that reproduces the original typing bug (open LoRA modal, close it, attempt to type in edit textarea, attempt to open model Select) and confirm the fix; delete the script after. SHIP Phase 1 as a standalone PR and PAUSE — do not begin Phase 2 until the user manually confirms the bug is gone.

Phase 2 / Step 6: Split reigh-app/src/domains/media-lightbox/components/EditModePanel.tsx (490 lines) into per-mode sibling components under editModes/: TextEditPanel.tsx, InpaintPanel.tsx, AnnotatePanel.tsx, RepositionPanel.tsx, Img2ImgPanel.tsx, UpscalePanel.tsx. Colocate with existing RepositionButtons and Img2ImgControls. Shrink EditModePanel.tsx to a thin router that picks a panel by editMode and forwards shared props/layout. Eliminate the IIFE-in-JSX blocks at lines 185, 253, 319. Target: EditModePanel.tsx under ~150 lines.

Phase 2 / Step 7 (decide): Enumerate the full stateOverrides surface at reigh-app/src/domains/media-lightbox/components/types.ts:33 — coreState (notably onClose), imageEditState, variantsState — and map to useLightboxCoreSafe, useImageEditFormSafe, useLightboxVariantsSafe in useEditModePanelState.ts (lines 49, 95). Read each provider's required surface (LightboxStateContext.tsx, ImageEditFormContext.tsx, variants provider) and compare diff size between Path A (wrap InlineEditView at InlineEditView.tsx:224 with LightboxStateProvider + LightboxVariantsProvider + existing ImageEditProvider and delete stateOverrides) and Path B (drop context reads in useEditModePanelState, require all three states as props, rename stateOverrides → required props). Document the chosen path and diff-size rationale in a note for the commit message. DO NOT pre-commit — decide now based on what you read.

Phase 2 / Step 7 (execute): Implement the path chosen in T7. If Path A: wrap InlineEditView.tsx:224 with LightboxStateProvider (passing real onClose), LightboxVariantsProvider, and the existing ImageEditProvider; delete stateOverrides from EditModePanelProps and the resolution logic in useEditModePanelState. If Path B: drop context reads in useEditModePanelState, propagate all three states as required props through EditModePanel and its router, rename stateOverrides → required props at the InlineEditView boundary. Either way, end state = exactly one source of truth for edit-panel state. Update tests that stub stateOverrides or context providers. Verify InlineEditView's close button still closes the inline editor.

Phase 2 / Step 8: In reigh-app/src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/useInpainting.ts, remove the `incomingSet ?? fallbackSet` pattern for annotationMode, inpaintPrompt, and inpaintNumGenerations at lines 109-131 (reported range 117-123 in idea). Delete the reset-on-undefined effect at ~line 133 once fallbacks are gone. Require setters from callers — persistence owns the prompt; everyone else reads/writes directly. Update test doubles accordingly.

Phase 2 validation: Run the reigh-app type-check, then run vitest for src/domains/media-lightbox and src/tools/edit-images. Manual smoke: every edit mode (text, inpaint, annotate, reposition, img2img, upscale) renders; prompts persist across mode switches; generate button wires up; InlineEditView's close button closes; variants controls remain functional. Ship Phase 2 as its own PR.

Phase 3 / Step 10: Enumerate every free-text field currently routed through debounced autosave. Known hits: main inpaint/magic-edit prompt; Img2Img prompt (Img2ImgControls.tsx:69); custom LoRA URL (EditModePanel.tsx:357, wired via useGenerationEditSettings.ts:219,235). Grep for other `setSettings({ …someText })` per-keystroke callers and include them. Switch each to save on input onBlur, generate click, and lightbox close. Keep sliders/toggles on the debounced path. On keystroke, write into pendingSettingsRef via trackPendingUpdate (no timer) so the existing entity-change cleanup effect at useDebouncedSettingsSave.ts:220-249 still flushes on close/unmount — if the lightbox only hides without unmounting, add an explicit onClose→flush hook. Remove ONLY editVersionRef + incrementEditVersion + the per-save `newer edits during save` comparator at useDebouncedSettingsSave.ts:166-171. PRESERVE pendingSettingsRef, pendingEntityIdRef, hasPendingFor, trackPendingUpdate, and the loader-side callsites at autoSaveSettingsLoaders.ts:61,132. Add a short comment at each preserved load-race callsite noting why it remains.

Phase 3 / Step 11: Consolidate useAutoSaveSettings entity-change coordination. Audit the three 'what should state be for this entity' mutators: useEditSettingsPersistence.ts:110-114 (ref mutation during render), autoSaveSettingsHelpers.ts::applyEntityChangeState (setSettings during render), and useCustomModeLoad (effect-based load). Introduce a useReducer inside useAutoSaveSettings keyed on (entityId, status, settings) with actions ENTITY_CHANGED, LOAD_STARTED, LOAD_RESOLVED, SETTINGS_UPDATED. Migrate all three mutators to dispatch; remove render-phase side effects. Preserve the public API of useAutoSaveSettings and the loader-side hasPendingFor interface. Commit separately from T11 within the Phase 3 PR if diff size allows.

Phase 3 validation: Run useAutoSaveSettings + edit-settings persistence tests. Manual stress test: fast keystrokes across main prompt AND Img2Img prompt AND custom LoRA URL; mode switch mid-type; lightbox close mid-type; entity switch while pending — verify zero characters lost and no data races. Ship Phase 3 as its own PR (or split T11/T12 into two PRs if combined diff is too large).

Phase 4 / Step 12: Detect existing custom-rule infra (e.g., reigh-app/eslint-rules/ directory or a no-restricted-syntax config). If present, add a rule that flags `IfStatement → ReturnStatement { argument: null }` immediately before a return whose JSX root is `<Dialog …>`. If absent, add a grep-based check script wired into the existing lint step. Add two fixtures: one passing, one violating. Confirm the rule fires on the violating fixture and passes on the compliant one.

Phase 4 / Step 13: Append a short section to reigh-app/CLAUDE.md documenting the no-op-default-context antipattern: required-provider hooks must throw when context is missing; offer a `Safe` variant only for genuinely optional consumers and justify inline. Reference this bug (typing dropped in edit textarea because EMPTY_FORM setters were no-ops) as the motivating incident. DO NOT create any new .md files.

Final verification: Run lint (including the new Phase 4 rule/check), type-check, and the full vitest suite for reigh-app. Write a short throwaway script that reproduces the original typing-blocked bug (open lightbox → enter edit mode → open LoRA selector → close it → type in textarea → open model Select) and confirm it now works; delete the script after verification. If any test fails, read the error, fix the code, and re-run until all pass. Do NOT create new permanent test files.
